```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    font-family: sans-serif;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .areas-of-interest {
    text-align: center;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 80%;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .areas-of-interest h1 {
    font-size: 2em;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .areas-of-interest p {
    font-size: 1.2em;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .columns {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    justify-items: center;
  }
  .column {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 5px;
  }
  .column h3 {
    font-size: 1.5em;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .columns {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .columns {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }
</style>
```

```{=html}
</head>
<body>
  <section class="areas-of-interest">
    <h1>Areas of Interest</h1>
    <p>Take a look at some of the things I love working on.</p>
    <div class="columns">
      <div class="column">
        <h3>Cloud Computing</h3>
        <p>I maintain servers for database storage, model training, and model deployment.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="column">
        <h3>NLP</h3>
        <p>I have worked with researchers to apply NLP techniques to make sense of the motivations behind human interactions.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="column">
        <h3>Machine Learning</h3>
        <p>Machine learning is more than an API call to scikit-learn, I love the math and theory as well as the implementation.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="column">
        <h3>Parallel Computing</h3>
        <p>I regularly extract data from Hadoop databases using the HIVE framework.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="column">
        <h3>Model Deployment</h3>
        <p>Implement machine learning models in real world production systems using REST API.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="column">
        <h3>Data Analytics</h3>
        <p>I love telling a story. Making a beautiful and compelling presentation is one of my favorite skills.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
  
```
